# TiMOS-B-26.3.R1 both/x86_64 Nokia 7750 SR-1
# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    router "Base" {
        aggregates {
            aggregate 10.100.0.0/16 {
                summary-only true
            }
        }
        static-routes {
            route 10.100.1.0/24 route-type unicast {
                blackhole {
                    admin-state enable
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
